product.name: ArWoWear T5 Soft El
product.familyDescriptorPl: Lekkie miękkie robocze — biel i pastele
product.familyDescriptorEn: Light soft workwear — whites and pastels
product.categorySourceGroup: Ripstop, elasthane and denim fabrics for outdoor wear.
product.titleDescriptor: 65% Polyester 30% Cotton 5% Elasthane Twill Fabric, 245 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 245 g/m², 65% Polyester 30% Cotton 5% El, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T5 Soft is light weight 245 g/m², 65% Polyester 30% Cotton 5% Elasthane durable, stretchable workwear twill fabric.
It is the stretchable version of ArWoWear T5 series.
65% Polyester 30% Cotton 5% Elasthane Twill Fabric, 245 gr/m'2
245 g/m², 65% Polyester 30% Cotton 5% El, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 65% Polyester (PES) 30% Cotton (CO) 5% Elasthane (EL) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>1000N; Weft>800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Application field states 'Coveralls', a generic workwear term, without any explicit military, police or uniformed-service reference.

stage1.noMatchReason: This is a generic light-weight stretch workwear twill fabric (65% Polyester/30% Cotton/5% Elasthane) intended for coveralls, with OEKO-TEX 100 certification. No explicit sector-specific application (military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building, transport) is stated in the product data.

evidence: ArWoWear T5 Soft is light weight 245 g/m², 65% Polyester 30% Cotton 5% Elasthane durable, stretchable workwear twill fabric.
familyDescriptorEn: Light soft workwear — whites and pastels
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly described as a coverall/workwear twill fabric with no narrower sector (military, medical, energy, etc.) stated, so it fits the general workwear-industrial category.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is explicitly supported by the product data.
